expectations.text: 包含 ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE ... SUSPEND
expectations.evidence: ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dw.order_summary SUSPEND; 等多条 SUSPEND 语句

expectations.text: 包含 ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE ... RESUME
expectations.evidence: ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dw.order_summary RESUME; 等多条 RESUME 语句

expectations.text: 提到 SHOW TABLES WHERE is_dynamic=true 或等效方式列出动态表
